channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Conflict Between US-Israel and Iran Enters Prolonged Phase with Economic and Strategic Implications
item.description: On the 14th day of the US–Israel war against Iran, the conflict is moving into a prolonged and grinding stage, showing no signs of a decisive military victory for either side. A significant event was ...

item.title: Internal PDP Dispute Persists as Factions Struggle to Reconcile Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) dey experience heavy wahala as the Wike-backed faction and the Turaki-led group never fit agree on reconciliation. The Wike faction dey continue with state congresse...

item.title: Sri Lanka returns bodies of 84 Iranian sailors after naval attack
item.description: On Friday, Sri Lanka repatriated the remains of 84 Iranian sailors whose warship, IRIS Dena, was torpedoed by a US submarine on March 4 near Sri Lankan waters. The incident has escalated tensions from...

item.title: Canada’s oil production offers limited shield against global crisis caused by Strait of Hormuz disruption
item.description: Canada, as the world’s fourth-largest oil producer and exporter, benefits economically from surging global oil prices amid the U.S.-Israel war with Iran that has effectively blocked the Strait of Horm...

item.title: Ibadan Pastor Accused of Mismanaging Donations and Alleged Sexual Misconduct
item.description: Na Oyo State, Ibadan-based pastor, Kayode Amusan wey people sabi as Agbala Gabriel, don dey face serious accusations wey dey bother many people online. E don dey alleged say e misuse donations wey peo...

item.title: Senate Approves Use of AI Chatbots for Official Work by Staff
item.description: The U.S. Senate has officially approved the use of three artificial intelligence chatbots—Google's Gemini Chat, OpenAI's ChatGPT, and Microsoft Copilot—for staff to assist with routine official work. ...

item.title: Comelec reports smooth start to Antipolo 2nd district special elections with no incidents
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) reported a peaceful and incident-free start to the special elections in Antipolo City's second congressional district on March 14, 2026. Comelec Chairperson Georg...

item.title: Oman's Foreign Minister Warns of Broader Regional Implications of the Conflict with Iran
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East, particularly targeting Iran, has raised questions about the true objectives of the aggressors. Officially, the reasons cited have shifted over time, including ...

item.title: Aloria: Brisbane’s hotel restaurant with great food and views despite mixed messaging
item.description: Aloria, perched 23 floors above The Star casino in Brisbane, presents a confusing identity but delivers strong food and views. Opened in October 2024, the 120-seater has billed itself as a signature f...

item.title: Ekurhuleni and Eskom agree on repayment plan to prevent electricity interruptions
item.description: Residents and businesses in Ekurhuleni are set to continue receiving electricity without disruption after the City of Ekurhuleni and Eskom finalised a repayment agreement. On 5 March 2026, Eskom issue...

item.title: Rivers State Government Strengthens Ties with Nigerian Air Force to Fight Insecurity
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don yan say him government still dey support Nigerian Air Force (NAF) as dem dey collaborate to tackle insecurity like pipeline vandalism and illegal oil ...

item.title: Montreal Welcomes Café Supporting Quebec Independence Movement
item.description: A new café promoting Quebec's independence has opened its doors in Montreal, signalling a growing cultural and political presence in the city. The café, which aims to serve as a gathering place for su...

item.title: Iran Warns of Retaliation on Oil Facilities After U.S. Military Strikes Kharg Island
item.description: Tensions in West Asia escalated sharply as the United States and Israel carried out military strikes on Iran’s key oil hub, Kharg Island, prompting stern warnings of retaliation from Tehran. The U.S. ...

item.title: Edwin Sifuna Responds to Senate Speaker Over TikTok Criticism
item.description: During a recent Senate session, Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna found himself in a funny but pointed exchange with Senate Speaker Amason Kingi over the use of TikTok among assembly members. Kingi had rai...

item.title: Lagos State Probes Death of Socialite Following Cosmetic Surgery
item.description: The Lagos State Government don begin proper investigation after socialite wey people dey call 'Elena' reportedly die following Brazilian Butt Lift (BBL) for one clinic wey dem no mention. According to...

item.title: Major News Updates Across Nigeria – March 14, 2026
item.description: The Naija News roundup for March 14, 2026, highlight plenty happenings across politics, economy, and society. A journalist, Segun Olawoye, raised alarm say his life dey in danger, calling out Minister...

item.title: Dozens of UK MPs and Peers Urge Government to Apologise for British Mandate Actions in Palestine (1917-1948)
item.description: A cross-party group of 45 MPs and peers has signed an open letter urging the British government to issue a formal apology for its historical actions during the administration of Palestine from 1917 to...

item.title: Kenya Sees Steady Decline in Crime Over Two Years, Says Police Chief
item.description: Kenya has witnessed a significant reduction in reported criminal cases over the last two years, according to the Inspector General of the National Police Service, Douglas Kanja. He revealed that crime...

item.title: Jack White Clarifies His Comments on Taylor Swift's Songwriting Style
item.description: Rock and Roll Hall of Famer Jack White recently addressed controversy stemming from comments he made about Taylor Swift's songwriting style. In an interview with The Guardian, White expressed that he ...

item.title: Construction of Mamire Gate at Tarangire National Park Nears Completion, Promises Better Tourist Access
item.description: The Mamire entrance gate at Tarangire National Park is almost finished and it is expected to make life easier for tourists who want to visit the park through Babati District. This new gate will give m...
